### Get Deleted

`<salesforce:get-deleted>`

Retrieves the list of records deleted from a particular time in the past (specified in minutes).

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Object Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Object type. The specified value must be a valid object for your organization.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Start Date</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Starting date or time, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), of the time frame for which to retrieve the data. The API ignores the value for seconds in the specified DateTime value (for example, 12:30:15 is interpreted as 12:30:00 UTC).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>End Date</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Ending date or time, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), of the time frame for which to retrieve the data. The API ignores the value for seconds in the specified DateTime value (for example, 12:35:15 is interpreted as 12:35:00 UTC).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetDeletedResult">Get Deleted Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Get Job State Bulk Api V2

`<salesforce:get-job-state-bulk-api-v2>`

Gets the state of a v2 Bulk job. This call uses the Bulk API v2.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Job ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BulkJobState">Bulk Job State</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Get Query Job Info Bulk Api V2

`<salesforce:get-query-job-info-bulk-api-v2>`

Returns the details of a query job based on its ID.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the query job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. ### Get Query Job Results Bulk Api V2

`<salesforce:get-query-job-results-bulk-api-v2>`

Returns the results of a query job based on its ID.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the query job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Records Per Page</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Number of records that are on each page retrieved from the API. This number influences the number of API requests and the memory used by the connector to handle the results.</p></div><div><p>Salesforce Connector automatically handles pagination and retrieves all pages before the next processing job starts.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>2000</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#non-repeatable-stream">Non-Repeatable Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY

- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT

- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Get Server Timestamp

`<salesforce:get-server-timestamp>`

Retrieves the current system timestamp, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), from the API.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS

### Get updated objects

`<salesforce:get-updated>`

Retrieves the list of individual records that are created or updated between the specified start and
end date.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Object Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Object type. The specified value must be a valid object for your organization.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Start Date</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Starting date or time, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), of the time frame for which to retrieve the data. The API ignores the value for seconds in the specified DateTime value (for example, 12:30:15 is interpreted as 12:30:00 UTC).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>End Date</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Ending date or time, in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), of the time frame for which to retrieve the data. The API ignores the value for seconds in the specified DateTime value (for example, 12:35:15 is interpreted as 12:35:00 UTC). If a value is not provided, the current server time is used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetUpdatedResult">Get Updated Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Get User Info

`<salesforce:get-user-info>`

Retrieves personal information for the user associated with the current session.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetUserInfoResult">Get User Info Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Invoke Apex Rest Method

`<salesforce:invoke-apex-rest-method>`

Invokes any operation from an Apex class that is exposed as a REST web service.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Request</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Object containing request information, some of which can include object <code>queryParams</code> with key-value pairs. These parameters are passed as URL parameters to the Apex Rest endpoint, for example:</p></div><div><p><code>queryParams: {AccountId : "a0w0E0000069MDxQAM" , ContactId: "0030E00000rRSJ6QAO" }</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apex Class Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Apex class name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apex Class Method Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Apex class method name. The method name format is:</p></div><div><p><code>ApexMethodName^RestResourceURL^HttpMethod^OutputType^InputParameterName1=ParameterType1,InputParameterName2=ParameterType2</code></p></div><div><p>For example:</p></div><div><p><code>getAccountInfo^/accountInfo/*^HttpGet^void</code></p></div><div><div data-type="NOTE">Special characters arenât allowed in <code>ApexMethodName</code>.</div></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Object</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><p>Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Invoke Apex Soap Method

`<salesforce:invoke-apex-soap-method>`

Invokes any operation from an Apex class that is exposed as a SOAP web service.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Input</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>InputStream with XML that contains information about the method to invoke and its parameters. The XML must adhere to the WSDL standards.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apex Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Parameters specifying the SOAP Headers to send to the API. For more information about the supported headers, see <a href="https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.apexcode.meta/apexcode/apex_api.htm">SOAP API and SOAP Headers for Apex</a>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#non-repeatable-stream">Non-Repeatable Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apex Class Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Apex class name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apex Class Method Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Apex class method name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Job Info

`<salesforce:job-info>`

Accesses the latest JobInfo of a submitted JobInfo ID. This operation enables you to track the
execution status.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Job ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Job ID of the job that is monitored.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Content type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>XML</p></li><li><p>CSV</p></li><li><p>JSON</p></li><li><p>ZIP_XML</p></li><li><p>ZIP_CSV</p></li><li><p>ZIP_JSON</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Content type used at job creation.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>XML</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#JobInfo">Job Info</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### List Metadata

`<salesforce:list-metadata>`

Retrieves property information about metadata components in your organization.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Metadata type used as a criterion when querying for information.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Merge

`<salesforce:merge>`

Merges up to three records into one record.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Records To Merge Ids</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of IDs of the objects to merge.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of record to merge.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Master Record</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Must provide the ID of the object that other records are merged into. Optionally, provide the fields to update and their values.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#MergeResult">Merge Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Merge Multiple

`<salesforce:merge-multiple>`

Combines up to three records of the same type into one record. The input is an array of MergeRequest
elements, each of which specifies the records to combine.

#### Limitations

- The only supported object types are:
  - Lead
  - Contact
  - Account
  - Person Account
  - Individual

Only objects of the same type can be merged. For example, merge leads only with leads.

- The **Merge Multiple** operation enables you to specify a list of a maximum of 200 merge requests.
- A merge request can contain a maximum of three IDs:
  - The master record ID
  - Up to two IDs for the records to merge into the primary record

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>List of Merge Records</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#MergeRecord">Merge Record</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of merge records. Each merge record contains the primary record, the record to merge IDs into, and an optional additional information map.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Map&lt;String, Object&gt;</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Declares the request headers to use with this operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#MergeResult">Merge Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Publish Platform Event Message

`<salesforce:publish-platform-event-message>`

Adds one new platform event to your organizationâs data.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Platform Event name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the platform event to create.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Platform Event Message</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List&lt;PlatformEventMessage&gt; ### Publish Streaming Channel

`<salesforce:publish-streaming-channel>`

Creates a streaming channel in which generic, custom messages are pushed.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Channel name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Descriptive name of the streaming channel. Limit of 80 characters, and must start with <code>/u/</code>. This value identifies the channel and must be unique.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Identifier for the channel owner.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description of what kinds of records are returned by the query. Limit of 255 characters.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#Result">Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

### Publish Topic

`<salesforce:publish-topic>`

Creates a topic representing a query that is used to notify listeners when changes are made to
records in an organization.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Topic name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Push Generic Event

`<salesforce:push-generic-event>`

Pushes generic streaming custom events to the specified streaming channel.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Events</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GenericStreamingEvent">Generic Streaming Event</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Event list.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Channel Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Streaming channel name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#PushEventResult">Push Event Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Query (Deprecated)

`<salesforce:query>`

Executes a query against the specified object and returns data that matches the specified criteria.
The returned fields are strings and, if necessary, you can convert them to the appropriate type, for
example, by using DataWeave and **Transform Message**.

The **Query** operation is now deprecated. Use the [**Query Xml Stream**](#queryXmlStream) operation
instead.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Salesforce Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query string that specifies the object to query, the fields to return, and any conditions for including a specific object in the query. For more information, see Salesforce Object Query Language (SOQL).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Parameters</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map with values for placeholders in <strong>Salesforce Query</strong>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Escape characters for parameters value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Escapes special characters for the <strong>Parameters</strong> value.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#non-repeatable-stream">Non-Repeatable Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Query All

`<salesforce:query-all>`

Retrieves data from specified objects, whether or not they have been deleted.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Salesforce Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query string that specifies the object to query, the fields to return, and any conditions for including a specific object in the query. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Query Result List

`<salesforce:query-result-list>`

Returns a list of result IDs for a specific batch. If the batch requires retries, there is more than
one <result> element in the output. Use this operation with
[Query Result Stream By Id](#queryResultStreamById) to obtain the results of the query.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Batch info</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#BatchInfo">Batch Info</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>BatchInfo to retrieve the results for.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Content type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>XML</p></li><li><p>CSV</p></li><li><p>JSON</p></li><li><p>ZIP_XML</p></li><li><p>ZIP_CSV</p></li><li><p>ZIP_JSON</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Content type used at job creation.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>XML</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Mime Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>MIME type of the payload output of this operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
