- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Query Result Stream By Id

`<salesforce:query-result-stream-by-id>`

Returns an InputStream with the query results for a specific result ID of a submitted BatchInfo.
Obtain the result IDs first by using the [Query Result List](#queryResultList) operation.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Batch info</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#BatchInfo">Batch Info</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>BatchInfo that returns the result ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Result ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Result ID obtained with <a href="#queryResultList">Query Result List</a>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Mime Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>MIME type of the payload output of this operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Encoding</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Encoding of the payload output of this operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#non-repeatable-stream">Non-Repeatable Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Query Xml Stream

`<salesforce:query-xml-stream>`

Executes a query against the specified object and returns data that matches the specified criteria.
This operation returns paginated results. Each result is an InputStream of XML records.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Salesforce Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query string that specifies the object to query, the fields to return, and any conditions for including a specific object in the query. For more information, see Salesforce Object Query Language (SOQL).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Parameters</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map with values for placeholders in <strong>Salesforce Query</strong>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Escape characters for parameters value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Escapes special characters for the <strong>Parameters</strong> value.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Mime Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>MIME type of the payload output of this operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Headers to include in the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Message of String payload and Void attributes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

### Read Metadata

`<salesforce:read-metadata>`

Returns one or more metadata components from your organization, given the objects' API names.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Metadata type of the components to read.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Full Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of full names of the components to read.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Rename Metadata

`<salesforce:rename-metadata>`

Renames a metadata component in your organization, given its old API name and the new name.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Metadata name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>New Full Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>New component full name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reset Password

`<salesforce:reset-password>`

Resets the password of the user corresponding to the provided user ID, or the user linked to the
connectorâs configuration, if the user ID field is null.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>User to reset the password for. If unspecified, the current user is used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ResetPasswordResult">Reset Password Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS

### Retrieve

`<salesforce:retrieve>`

Retrieves one or more records based on the specified IDs.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of record to retrieve.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Retrieve Request</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RetrieveRequest">Retrieve Request</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Must provide the IDs and specify the fields for the records to retrieve.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Retrieve Job Failed Results Bulk V2

`<salesforce:retrieve-job-failed-results-bulk-v2>`

Gets the status of the failed processed SObjects. This call uses the Bulk API v2.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Job ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#JobFailedRecordResults">Job Failed Record Results</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><p>Object</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Retrieve Job Successful Results Bulk V2

`<salesforce:retrieve-job-successful-results-bulk-v2>`

Gets the status of the successfully processed SObjects. This call uses the Bulk API v2.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Job ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Retrieve Job Unprocessed Results Bulk V2

`<salesforce:retrieve-job-unprocessed-results-bulk-v2>`

Gets the status of the unprocessed sObjects. This call uses the Bulk API v2.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Job ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Retrieve Metadata

`<salesforce:retrieve-metadata>`

Retrieves XML file representations of components in an organization.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Package Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of package names to retrieve. If you are retrieving only unpackaged components, do not specify a name. You can retrieve packaged and unpackaged components in the same retrieval operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Specific Files</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of file names to retrieve. If a value is specified for this property, <strong>Package Names</strong> must be set to null.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Unpackaged</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Stream containing a list of components to retrieve that are not in a package.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#non-repeatable-stream">Non-Repeatable Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Search

`<salesforce:search>`

Searches for objects using Salesforce Object Search Language (SOSL). Mimics using the search box
inside the Salesforce UI.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Search String</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query string that specifies the object to query, the fields to return, and any conditions for including a specific object in the query. For more information, see Salesforce Object Search Language (SOSL).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Parameters</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map with values for placeholders in <strong>Search String</strong>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#SearchResult">Search Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Set Password

`<salesforce:set-password>`

Changes the password of a user or a self service user to a value that you specify.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>User to set the password for.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>New Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>New password for the user.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Unauthorize

`<salesforce:unauthorize>`

Deletes all of the access token information of a given resource owner ID so that it is impossible to
execute an operation for that user without performing the OAuth dance.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Resource Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the resource owner for whom to invalidate access.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

### Update

`<salesforce:update>`

Updates one or more existing records in your organizationâs data.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of record to update.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Records</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Records to add to your organization.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BulkOperationResult">Bulk Operation Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION
- SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Update Metadata

`<salesforce:update-metadata>`

Updates one or more metadata components in your organization.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Metadata type of the components to update.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Metadata Objects</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of Map&lt;String, Object&gt; representing the metadata to update.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Upsert

`<salesforce:upsert>`

Upserts a homogeneous list of objects. Creates new records and updates existing records using a
custom field to determine the presence of existing records. In most cases, use
`#upsert(String, String, List, Map)` over `#create(String, List, Map)` to avoid creating unwanted,
duplicate records.

> [!NOTE] Although you cannot change the **Content Type** value for a bulk upsert, you can use the
> [**Create Job**](#createJob) operation to set the content type to CSV (or zipped CSV if you reach
> the character limit) and then follow up with the [**Create Batch**](#createBatch) operation.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Object Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of record to upsert.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>External Id Field Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Either of the following:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>For a custom object, the name of the field that contains the external ID field name</p></li><li><p>For a standard object, the name of the field that contains the ID lookup field name</p></li></ul></div><div><div data-type="NOTE">Unless you configure the <strong>External Id Field Name</strong> field for the SObject to upsert, the <strong>Upsert</strong> operation fails.</div></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Records</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Records to add to your organization.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BulkOperationResult">Bulk Operation Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED
- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS
- SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION

- SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT
- SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED

### Upsert Metadata

`<salesforce:upsert-metadata>`

Creates or updates one or more metadata components in your organization.

For a picklist field in an object, the **Upsert Metadata** operation updates only the picklist
mapping for that specific object. To update the actual picklist values, such as adding or removing
values in the picklist, use the [**Deploy Metadata**](#deployMetadata) operation. You must perform a
metadata deploy for **Custom Field** or **Global Picklist** based on whether the picklist is tied to
a custom field or is a global picklist.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Metadata type of the components to create or update.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Metadata Objects</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of Map&lt;String, Object&gt; representing the metadata to upsert.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Config Ref</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Headers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Map of HTTP headers allowed by Salesforce SOAP API to pass with the request.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How long the consumer waits for a response before it times out.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Read Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Error Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set of error mappings.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#UpsertMetadataResult">Upsert Metadata Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#sfdc-config)

#### Throws

- SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY
- SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
- SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT

### Action Override

Action override.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Available In Touch</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether available in touch or not.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>From Factor</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>From factor.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Page Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Page ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>URL.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Additional Information Map

Additional information map.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the map.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Value of the map.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Create Job Request

Create job request.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>External Id Field Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the field on this object. Use this attribute for custom objects or the ID lookup field property for standard objects (only required for upsert operations).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Content Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>XML</p></li><li><p>CSV</p></li><li><p>JSON</p></li><li><p>ZIP_XML</p></li><li><p>ZIP_CSV</p></li><li><p>ZIP_JSON</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Content type for the job results.</p></div><div><p>When specifying a content type different from XML for a query type, use the <a href="https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.api_asynch.meta/api_asynch/asynch_api_reference_batchinfo.htm">queryResultStream(BatchInfo)</a> method to retrieve results.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Concurrency Mode</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>Parallel</p></li><li><p>Serial</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Concurrency mode of the job.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

If specified, the alias must be in the truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Deploy Metadata Request

Deploy metadata request.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Stream</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Stream containing the data. This option only works in the Developer Edition or in sandbox organizations; it does not work in production organizations.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Rollback On Error</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, failures cause a complete rollback.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>true</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default createable or not.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Custom</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates ### Expiration Policy

Configures an expiration policy strategy.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the maximum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Max Idle Time</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Field

Field.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default not.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Digits</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Digits.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Display decimal.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether encrypted or not.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Extra Type of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>STRING</p></li><li><p>BOOLEAN</p></li><li><p>INT</p></li><li><p>DOUBLE</p></li><li><p>DATE</p></li><li><p>DATETIME</p></li><li><p>TIME</p></li><li><p>BASE64</p></li><li><p>ID</p></li><li><p>REFERENCE</p></li><li><p>CURRENCY</p></li><li><p>TEXTAREA</p></li><li><p>PERCENT</p></li><li><p>PHONE</p></li><li><p>URL</p></li><li><p>EMAIL</p></li><li><p>COMBOBOX</p></li><li><p>PICKLIST</p></li><li><p>MULTIPICKLIST</p></li><li><p>ANYTYPE</p></li><li><p>DATACATEGORYGROUPREFERENCE</p></li><li><p>ENCRYPTEDSTRING</p></li><li><p>ADDRESS</p></li><li><p>COMPLEXVALUE</p></li><li><p>LOCATION</p></li><li><p>JSON</p></li><li><p>LONG</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Field Fixed frequency.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Frequency at which the scheduler initiates the flow, based on the time unit specified in the <strong>Time Unit</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>1000</code> (MILLISECONDS)</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Start delay</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Amount of time that the scheduler waits before initiating the flow for the first time after the app starts. ### Keystore

Configures the keystore for the TLS protocol. The keystore you generate contains a private key and a
public certificate.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Path to the keystore. Mule resolves the path relative to the current classpath and file system.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the key to use when the keystore contains multiple private keys. By default, Mule uses the first key in the file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password used to protect the keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Encryption algorithm that the keystore uses.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Lead Convert Request

Lead convert request.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Contact Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the contact into which the lead is merged (this contact must be associated with the specified account ID, and an account ID must be specified). Required only when updating an existing contact.</p></div><div><div><div><div data-type="IMPORTANT">If you are converting a lead into a person account, do not specify the contact ID or else an error results. Specify only the account ID of the person account. If no contact ID is specified, then the API creates a new contact that is implicitly associated with the account. To create a new contact, the client application must be logged in with sufficient access rights. To merge a lead into an existing contact, the client application must be logged in with read or write access to the specified contact. The contact name and other existing data are not overwritten (unless <strong>Over Write Lead Source</strong> is set to <code>true</code>, in which case only the lead source field is overwritten). For information on IDs, see ID Field Type.</div></div></div></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Account Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the account into which the lead is merged. Required only when updating an existing account, including person accounts. If no account ID is specified, then the API creates a new account. To create a new account, the client application must be logged in with sufficient access rights. To merge a lead into an existing account, the client application must be logged in with read or write access to the specified account. The account name and other existing data are not overwritten. For information on IDs, see ID Field Type.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Send Email To Owner</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, specifies whether to send a notification email to the owner specified in the <strong>Owner ID</strong>.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Opportunity Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the opportunity to create. If unspecified, this value defaults to the company name of the lead. The maximum length of this field is 80 characters. If <strong>Do Not Create Opportunity</strong> is <code>true</code>, then no opportunity is created and this field must be left blank; otherwise, an error is returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Do Not Create Opportunity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to create an opportunity during lead conversion. Set this flag to <code>true</code> only if you do not want to create an opportunity from the lead. An opportunity is created by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Over Write Lead Source</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to overwrite the lead source field on the target contact object with the contents of the lead source field in the source lead object. To set this field to <code>true</code>, the client application must specify a <strong>Contact Id</strong> for the target contact.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Opportunity Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of an existing opportunity to relate to a lead during lead conversion.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name associated with the owner ID that owns this lead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Related Person Account Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When converting a lead to a business account and an existing person account, this value specifies the ID of the person account.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Related Person Account Record</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When converting a lead to a business account and a new person account, this value specifies the entity record of the new person account.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
